PHYS748 Seminar in Experimental Nuclear Physics (1 Credit)

PHYS819 Special Topics in General Physics (1-4 Credits) Credit according to work done.

PHYS749 Seminar in Theoretical Nuclear Physics (1 Credit)

PHYS752 Elementary Particle Physics II: Theory (3 Credits) Survey of elementary particles and their properties, quantum ﬁeld theory, meson theory, weak interactions, possible extensions of elementary particle theory. Prerequisite: PHYS751 and PHYS624.

PHYS828 Special Topics in Atomic and Molecular Physics (1-4 Credits) Credit according to work done.

PHYS829 Special Topics in Quantum Mechanics and Quantum Electronics (1-4 Credits) Credit according to work done.
